content.problemStatement:
You are given a rectangular grid with NNN rows and MMM columns. A number Ai,jA_{i,j}Ai,j​ is written in the cell belonging to the ithi^{th}ith row and the jthj^{th}jth column.


Ai,j=1A_{i,j} = 1Ai,j​=1, for all 1≤i≤N1 \leq i \leq N1≤i≤N and 1≤j≤M1 \leq j \leq M1≤j≤M, except for i=Ni = Ni=N and j=Mj = Mj=M.
AN,M=0A_{N, M} = 0AN,M​=0.
Find the number of sub-rectangular grids which contain only 111s.


Input Format

First line will contain TTT, number of testcases. Then the testcases follow.
Each testcase contains of a single line of input, two integers N,MN, MN,M.


Output Format
For each testcase, print the number of sub-rectangular grids containing only 111s.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Test case-1: Consider the following rectangles :

Rectangle made up of cell (1,1)(1,1)(1,1).
Rectangle made up of cell (1,2)(1,2)(1,2).
Rectangle made up of cell (2,1)(2,1)(2,1).
Rectangle made up of cells (1,1)(1,1)(1,1) and (1,2)(1,2)(1,2).
Rectangle made up of cells (1,1)(1,1)(1,1) and (2,1)(2,1)(2,1).

Total 555 sub-rectangles of given grid are made up of only 111s.
